description_long: This modern bungalow is set within a fenced rectangular plot, featuring a flat roof and a multi-level design with clean, geometric lines. The property includes a spacious wooden deck, a swimming pool, and a landscaped garden with manicured hedges and trees. The front area has a double driveway with parking for two cars, while the rear includes a covered outdoor dining area and additional green space. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, maximizing natural light and providing views of the garden and pool. The exterior is finished in a combination of white, gray, and natural wood tones, with touches of black for fencing and trim. The overall layout emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a pool, wooden deck, landscaped garden, and large windows, enclosed by a fence. The design features clean lines, outdoor living spaces, and a double driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double driveway, front gate, and a clear view of the pool and deck area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and dense landscaping along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered outdoor dining area, backyard, and the arrangement of windows and doors facing the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the rear deck, garden, and the bungalow's multi-level structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
